commands.name: setup
commands.description: Initialize GPIO LED pin and active-high behavior.

commands.name: on_for
commands.description: Turn the LED on for a duration, then turn it off.

commands.name: blink
commands.description: Blink the LED with the given timing.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Blink the LED quickly to verify wiring.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Return driver metadata and current configuration.
